attributes.action: Completely ban the use of ai for all purposes
attributes.additional_details: The government and parliament are the only ones capable of making it possible as corporations will not stop the use due to them making profits
attributes.background: I want the ban of ai completely due to the use of usable water and resources

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Ban all use of AI in the UK
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/754836
